title: Friday
content:
From feasts abstain; be temperate, and pray;
    Fast if thou wilt; and yet, throughout the day,
    Neglect no labour and no duty shirk:
    Not many hours are left thee for thy work - 
        And it were meet
         That all should be complete.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Ella Wheeler Wilcox delivers a powerful performance in "Friday"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
